source_description: Org-wide DX infrastructure and release governance automation: GitHub Actions publishing workflows (npm, PyPI, crates.io), pre-commit/pre-push hooks, Taskfile or CLI DX commands, experimental/dev/alpha package variants and release channels following the existing 5-tier release channel governance (alpha → canary → beta → rc → prod) as defined in STACKED_PRS_AND_RELEASE_CHANNELS.md. Should cover all repos in the Phenotype org.
